task_completion.description: Verify that the First Name, Last Name, and Sex are entered correctly in the registration form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing 'Marcus' in the First Name field, 'Wellington' in the Last Name field, and 'Male' selected in the Sex field (or visible in the patient summary).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Date of Birth is entered exactly as specified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing '1978-11-23' (or Nov 23, 1978) in the Date of Birth field or patient header.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Mobile Phone and Email address are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing '413-555-0199' in the Mobile Phone field and 'marcus.wellington@email.test' in the Email field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the full address (Street, City, State, Zip) is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing '742 Evergreen Terrace', 'Springfield', 'Massachusetts', and '01103' in the corresponding address fields.

task_completion.description: Verify that the patient record was successfully saved and the system displays the new patient's dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the OpenEMR patient dashboard/summary specifically for 'Marcus Wellington' (often visible in the top header or main frame) or a 'Patient created' success message.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the OpenEMR web interface to enter data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenEMR web application inside a browser window, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use command-line tools (curl, SQL) to inject the patient data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing data insertion commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent entered the specific data requested, not generic placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The forms should contain 'Marcus Wellington' and specific details, not 'Test Patient' or 'John Doe'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Patient Details: Name: Marcus Wellington | Sex: Male | DOB: 1978-11-23 | Address: 742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield, Massachusetts 01103 | Phone: 413-555-0199 | Email: marcus.wellington@email.test
